payload.description: Tracks the longitudinal disease status, staging, and vital status of patients across different time points of clinical follow-up.
Unique identifier for the patient, typically following the TCGA barcode format.
The relative number of days from diagnosis or a baseline date when this status began.
The relative number of days from diagnosis when this specific status ended.
The category of the timeline entry, consistently labeled as STATUS in this dataset.
The specific clinical milestone or disease state recorded at this time point.
The stage of the cancer as determined by pathological examination of tissues.
The edition of the AJCC staging manual used to determine the cancer stage.
Distal metastasis status based on pathology.
Lymph node involvement status based on pathology.
Primary tumor size and extent based on pathology.
The medical procedure or technique used to obtain the initial diagnosis.
The body location where the disease event or biopsy occurred.
Indicative whether the patient currently has a clinical burden of tumor.
The survival state of the patient at the time the record was generated.
